allow: Bash(tree -L 3 -I node_modules /workspaces/takibi/schema-to-libray 2>/dev/null || find /workspaces/takibi/schema-to-libray -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -type d | sort | head -40)
Bash(cd /workspaces/takibi/schema-to-libray/packages/schema-to-library && mkdir -p src/utils src/generator/zod src/generator/valibot src/generator/effect)

Bash(cp src/helper/utils/index.ts src/utils/index.ts && cp src/helper/utils/index.test.ts src/utils/index.test.ts && cp src/zod/*.ts src/generator/zod/ && cp src/valibot/*.ts src/generator/valibot/ && cp src/effect/*.ts src/generator/effect/ && cp src/helper/dep/resolve-schema-dependencies-from-shema.ts src/helper/resolve-schema-dependencies-from-schema.ts && cp src/helper/dep/resolve-schema-dependencies-from-shema.test.ts src/helper/resolve-schema-dependencies-from-schema.test.ts && cp src/helper/dep/type.test.ts src/generator/zod/type.test.ts)

Bash(node -e "const v = require\('./packages/schema-to-library/node_modules/vitest/package.json'\); console.log\('vitest:', v.version\); const c = require\('./packages/schema-to-library/node_modules/@vitest/coverage-v8/package.json'\); console.log\('coverage-v8:', c.version\)")
Bash(ls packages/schema-to-library/src/**/*.test.ts 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo "---"; find packages/schema-to-library/src -name "*.test.ts" 2>/dev/null | head -10)
Bash(find packages/schema-to-library/src/generator -name '*.ts' ! -name '*.test.ts' -exec sed -i "s/ as string | undefined//g" {} +)
Bash(find packages/schema-to-library/src/generator -name '*.ts' ! -name '*.test.ts' -exec sed -i "s/ as Record<string, string> | undefined//g" {} +)
Bash(find packages/schema-to-library/src -name '*.ts' ! -name '*.test.ts' -exec sed -i "s/Record<string, JSONSchema>/{ [key: string]: JSONSchema }/g" {} +)
Bash(find packages/schema-to-library/src -name '*.ts' ! -name '*.test.ts' -exec sed -i "s/v: unknown\): v is Record<string, unknown>/v: unknown\): v is { [key: string]: unknown }/g" {} +)

Bash(python3 -c "
import re
s = r'type RootType = {status?: StatusType}\\n\\ntype StatusType = \(string | number\)'
result = re.sub\(r'\\btype \(\\w+\)Type = ', r'type _\\1 = ', s\)
print\(repr\(result\)\)
")
